name: wizda
description: Wizardry Variants Daphne assistant — works out how much junk (loot boxes) you need to farm to guarantee a specific item

scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web-client"
scripts.dev:back: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:api
scripts.db:setup: npx prisma migrate deploy && node scripts/seed-with-maintenance.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npx prisma generate && npm run build:backend-api && npm run build:web-client
